implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Efficiency objective for Bookkeeping: The system must support multiple currencies and handle currency conversion
The system shall ensure efficiency (resource utilization): The system must support multiple currencies and handle currency conversion
The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): Users must be able to generate financial reports such as balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements
The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): The system must ensure double-entry bookkeeping principles are followed and maintain an audit trail of all transactions
The system shall ensure sustainability (environmental impact awareness): A bookkeeping system must record financial transactions including income and expenses
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (integrity guarantees): The system must support multiple accounts and categories
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (auditability): A bookkeeping system must record financial transactions including income and expenses
